It belongs to the phylum Mollusca and the class Gastropoda. This classification places Callista aloifolia within the larger group of marine animals that possess a soft, unsegmented body and a shell for protection. The family Rissoinidae is a group of small to medium-sized sea snails that are found in tropical and subtropical regions. As a member of this family, Callista aloifolia shares characteristics with other species that are adapted to life in shallow marine environments.
